creator: frederic@culot.org
text:
Thanks for pointing out this issue Sahil.

Actually the Module::Build version shiped with perl-5.10 (0.340201) is enough to
build p5-File-ChangeNotify. I have run tests successfully with this version so I
believe it is safe to ignore the configure warning and to avoid pulling in a
newer version of p5-Module-Build from ports.
